nasb.text: So they were saying to Him, “Who are You?” Jesus said to them, “What have I been saying to you from the beginning?

esv.text: So they said to him, “Who are you?” Jesus said to them, “Just what I have been telling you from the beginning.

cnv.text: 他們就問：“你是誰？”耶穌說：“我不是從起初就告訴你們嗎？

ccb.text: 他们问：“你到底是谁？” 耶稣回答说：“我不是早就告诉你们了吗？

csbs.text: 他们问：“你到底是谁？” 耶稣说：“我从一开始就告诉你们了。
